_credit.license: PixelLab Terms of Service — output may be used commercially in user projects. May NOT be used to train models.
_credit.prompt: small realistic side-view orange shiba-inu style dog, NOT chibi, NOT fluffy, slim body, small head proportional to body, short curled tail, small black dot eyes, single black outline, simple flat colors, 3-color palette only, minimalist farm animal sprite, Stardew Valley style, Vadimsadovski Adobe Stock pixel animal collection style, classic 16-bit RPG NPC, sitting calmly facing right

_notes.paletteScheme: Quantised to PetPalettes index 0 (Orange). Slots: 1=outline 2=primary 3=secondary 4=highlight 5=accent 6=pattern. Swap the palette block at render time to recolour.
_notes.mirrored: All frames mirrored horizontally during import (East-facing baseline; PixelLab west.png faces left).
_notes.groundOffsetsY: Per-stage feet-row index from the top of the 48-row canvas — used by PetStage to bottom-anchor sprites so all displayScales sit on the ground line correctly.
